description_long: This is a mid-top athletic shoe predominantly white with bold red accents, including the sole, laces, and inner lining. The shoe features three red Adidas stripes on the side, a signature and number written in black marker on the outer side, and a visible Adidas logo on the tongue and heel. The upper is constructed from synthetic leather with mesh or textile elements for breathability, and the sole appears to be made of durable rubber with cushioning for impact absorption. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style, and the shoe has a padded collar and tongue for comfort and ankle support. The overall design is sporty and functional, suitable for urban environments and athletic activities.
description: A white and red mid-top Adidas athletic shoe with signature details, red accents, and a standard criss-cross lacing system.
description_view_0: Side view showing the Adidas stripes, signature, and red accents on the sole and collar.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the red laces, Adidas logo on the tongue, and toe box shape.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the clean white surface, red sole, and subtle design lines.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the Adidas logo on the heel and the padded red collar.
attribute_logo: Adidas logo in white on the tongue and in red on the heel
